reviews.review_msg: After taking STAT 285 with a certain prof, it's rather refreshing to take a stats course where the instructor actually goes through examples during lectures. And the exams are actually reflective of the assignments and examples? Inconceivable!

Amazing. Unlike some professors who just read slides, she genuinely helps you understand the material. You can tell she really cares about student learning. Exams are very fair and closely based on quizzes and assignments, with no overly difficult proof questions.
